magicItems.name: Adamantine Armor
magicItems.desc: This armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. While I'm wearing it, any Critical Hit against me becomes a normal hit.

magicItems.name: Adventurer's Ring
magicItems.desc: While the cover of this ring is open, the ring produces a flame that creates no heat and consumes no fuel. It sheds Bright Light in a 20-ft radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 ft. As a Bonus Action, I can close the cover, smothering the flame, or open it again.

magicItems.name: Aboleth Brain
magicItems.desc:
*The Brain of a young Aboleth, tainted by an otherwordly power.* The brain can be consumed, granting the following bonuses:

Otherwordly Memories
Your mind becomes flooded with cosmic memories that aren't your own. Once per day, you may attempt to call upon these memories to try and glean some information about a particular item, place, creature or course of action by making a Wisdom saving throw.
On a 20+, you may ask the DM one question, and receive a vague but truthful answer, provided the answer is within these memories. If it is not, the daily use of this feature is not consumed.
On a 15-19, you may ask the DM one question, and receive a vision associated with the question asked, provided the answer is within these memories.
On a 14 or lower, you take 3d8 psychic damage and have the stunned condition for 1 minute, as your mind is flooded with incomprehensible thoughts.

Improved Mutations
You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls with your organic weapons.

Devouring Urge
Once per turn when you hit a creature with your organic weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic or Psychic damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice to roll it and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point). In addition, the flesh consumed by the creature temporarily alters your form. The DM will either:
Grant you a temporary mutation of the DM's choice, which last for 1 minute. Using this feature again on a different creature will replace an existing mutation with the newest one.
Roll a d100. You gain a random mutation from the Mutations Table, which lasts for 1 minute. Using this feature again on a different creature will replace any existing mutation/s with the newest one/s.

magicItems.name: Absorbing Tattoo
magicItems.desc: When I attune to this magic needle, it disappears and I gain a magical tattoo of a design of my choosing. It grants me resistance to a damage type. As a reaction once per dawn when I take that type of damage, I can gain immunity against that instance of damage and recover half the damage as HP.

magicItems.name: Alchemy Jug
magicItems.desc: As an action, command the jug to produce liquid; or an action to uncorked it and pour 2 gal/min. After producing, it only makes the same up to its max, until next dawn. Oil (1 qt), acid (8 fl oz), basic poison (1/2 fl oz), beer (4 gal), honey/wine (1 gal), fresh water (8 gal), mayonnaise/vinegar (2 gal), salt water (12 gal).

magicItems.name: Amulet of Betrayal
magicItems.desc: As a bonus action, I can move one of the following conditions from myself to an ally within 60 ft: blinded, deafened, frightened, poisoned, stunned, exhaustion. When transferring exhaustion, all my exhaustion levels are moved. If the chosen ally is immune to a transferred condition, the transfer fails.

magicItems.name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
magicItems.desc:
While wearing this amulet, you are hidden from divination magic. You cannot be targeted by any divination spell or perceived through magical scrying sensors unless you allow it.

Shielded Bond. During a short or long rest, you can choose up to four willing creatures within 30 feet of you to share this protection. For the next 24 hours, or until you are Incapacitated, the chosen creatures gain the benefits of this amulet. Once you use this property, you cannot do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

magicItems.name: Armor of Weightlessness
magicItems.desc: This armor has 5 charges, regaining 1d4+1 expended charges daily at dawn. As a bonus action while wearing it, I can expend 1 or more charges to cast Jump (1 charge) or Levitate (2 charges) on myself.
